cat.llm 3.1.0
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with CatLLM for R
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

cat.llm 3.1.0

  • Added cat.pol and cat.web to the meta-package; full ecosystem is now 7 sub-packages (cat.stack base + 6 domain packages).
  • New domain-suffixed aliases: classify_political(), extract_political(), explore_political(), summarize_political(), classify_web(), extract_web(), explore_web(), summarize_web().
  • Startup message now lists all 7 sub-packages.

cat.llm 3.0.0

  • Initial meta-package release. Installs and loads the full CatLLM ecosystem (cat.stack, cat.survey, cat.vader, cat.ademic, cat.cog).
  • Provides domain-suffixed aliases (classify_survey(), classify_social(), classify_academic(), cerad_drawn_score()) re-exported from each sub-package.

On this page

Developed by Chris Soria.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
